endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AnalysisServices/locations/{location}/checkNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Check the name availability in the target location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AnalysisServices/locations/{location}/operationresults/{operationId}
endpoints.description: List the result of the specified operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AnalysisServices/locations/{location}/operationstatuses/{operationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AnalysisServices/servers
endpoints.description: Lists all the Analysis Services servers for the given subscription.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.AnalysisServices/skus
